name: PM — 08: New Tenant Registration (v2 Gatekeeper TEST)

parameters.jsCode: const b=$input.first().json.body;const spam=/^(test|asdf|dummy|fake|abc|xxx|sample)/i;if(!b.fullName||!b.email||!b.phone||!(b.unit||b.address))throw new Error('Missing required fields');if(!b.consentGiven)throw new Error('DPA consent required');if(spam.test(b.fullName))throw new Error('Invalid name format');if(!b.govIdBase64||!b.selfieBase64)throw new Error('Both documents required');const unit=b.unit||b.address||'';const notionQuery={filter:{or:[{property:'Email',email:{equals:b.email}},{property:'Phone',phone_number:{equals:b.phone}},{property:'Unit / Room',rich_text:{contains:unit}}]},page_size:1};return[{json:{fullName:b.fullName.trim(),email:b.email.trim().toLowerCase(),phone:b.phone.trim(),unit,emergencyContactName:b.emergencyContactName||'',emergencyContactPhone:b.emergencyContactPhone||'',govIdBase64:b.govIdBase64,selfieBase64:b.selfieBase64,consentGiven:true,notionQuery}}];
const notionItem=$input.first().json;const b=$('Code — V1: Input Validate').first().json;const isDuplicate=!!(notionItem&&notionItem.id);return[{json:{...b,isDuplicate}}];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ valid: false, reason: 'This contact or unit is already registered. Contact the owner if you need help.' }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const b=$input.first().json;const sys='You are a tenant identity verification agent. Output ONLY a raw JSON object with no markdown or code blocks. Required fields: decision (APPROVED or REJECTED), confidence (number 0.0-1.0), reason (string), flags (array). Valid flags: face_mismatch name_mismatch id_unreadable selfie_unreadable liveness_fail id_appears_fake. Set decision=APPROVED only if the selfie face matches the ID face AND the submitted name matches the name on the ID. Be strict about face mismatches. Raw JSON only.';const payload={model:'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6',messages:[{role:'system',content:sys},{role:'user',content:[{type:'text',text:'Submitted name: ['+b.fullName+']. Two images: (1) government ID, (2) selfie. Verify that the selfie face matches the ID face AND the submitted name matches the name on the ID. Return ONLY the raw JSON decision object.'},{type:'image_url',image_url:{url:'data:image/jpeg;base64,'+b.govIdBase64,detail:'high'}},{type:'image_url',image_url:{url:'data:image/jpeg;base64,'+b.selfieBase64,detail:'high'}},]}],max_tokens:300,temperature:0.1};return[{json:{payload,originalData:b}}];

const r=$input.first().json;const orig=$('Code — V3: Build AI Request').first().json.originalData;const content=r?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content||'';let d;try{const s=content.indexOf('{');const e=content.lastIndexOf('}');if(s===-1||e===-1)throw new Error('No JSON in AI response');d=JSON.parse(content.substring(s,e+1));}catch(e){return[{json:{...orig,aiDecision:'REJECTED',aiConfidence:0,aiReason:'Parse error: '+e.message,aiFlags:['parse_error']}}];}return[{json:{...orig,aiDecision:d.decision||'REJECTED',aiConfidence:+(d.confidence)||0,aiReason:d.reason||'',aiFlags:Array.isArray(d.flags)?d.flags:[]}}];

function sha256(b){const K=[0x428a2f98,0x71374491,0xb5c0fbcf,0xe9b5dba5,0x3956c25b,0x59f111f1,0x923f82a4,0xab1c5ed5,0xd807aa98,0x12835b01,0x243185be,0x550c7dc3,0x72be5d74,0x80deb1fe,0x9bdc06a7,0xc19bf174,0xe49b69c1,0xefbe4786,0x0fc19dc6,0x240ca1cc,0x2de92c6f,0x4a7484aa,0x5cb0a9dc,0x76f988da,0x983e5152,0xa831c66d,0xb00327c8,0xbf597fc7,0xc6e00bf3,0xd5a79147,0x06ca6351,0x14292967,0x27b70a85,0x2e1b2138,0x4d2c6dfc,0x53380d13,0x650a7354,0x766a0abb,0x81c2c92e,0x92722c85,0xa2bfe8a1,0xa81a664b,0xc24b8b70,0xc76c51a3,0xd192e819,0xd6990624,0xf40e3585,0x106aa070,0x19a4c116,0x1e376c08,0x2748774c,0x34b0bcb5,0x391c0cb3,0x4ed8aa4a,0x5b9cca4f,0x682e6ff3,0x748f82ee,0x78a5636f,0x84c87814,0x8cc70208,0x90befffa,0xa4506ceb,0xbef9a3f7,0xc67178f2];const H=new Uint32Array([0x6a09e667,0xbb67ae85,0x3c6ef372,0xa54ff53a,0x510e527f,0x9b05688c,0x1f83d9ab,0x5be0cd19]);const r=(x,n)=>(x>>>n)|(x<<(32-n));const l=b.length,pl=Math.ceil((l+9)/64)*64,p=new Uint8Array(pl);p.set(b);p[l]=0x80;const d0=new DataView(p.buffer);d0.setUint32(pl-4,(l*8)>>>0,false);d0.setUint32(pl-8,Math.floor(l*8/0x100000000),false);for(let i=0;i<pl;i+=64){const W=new Uint32Array(64),dv=new DataView(p.buffer,i,64);for(let j=0;j<16;j++)W[j]=dv.getUint32(j*4,false);for(let j=16;j<64;j++){const s0=r(W[j-15],7)^r(W[j-15],18)^(W[j-15]>>>3),s1=r(W[j-2],17)^r(W[j-2],19)^(W[j-2]>>>10);W[j]=(W[j-16]+s0+W[j-7]+s1)>>>0;}let a=H[0],bb=H[1],c=H[2],d=H[3],e=H[4],f=H[5],g=H[6],h=H[7];for(let j=0;j<64;j++){const t1=(h+(r(e,6)^r(e,11)^r(e,25))+(e&f^~e&g)+K[j]+W[j])>>>0,t2=((r(a,2)^r(a,13)^r(a,22))+(a&bb^a&c^bb&c))>>>0;h=g;g=f;f=e;e=(d+t1)>>>0;d=c;c=bb;bb=a;a=(t1+t2)>>>0;}H[0]=(H[0]+a)>>>0;H[1]=(H[1]+bb)>>>0;H[2]=(H[2]+c)>>>0;H[3]=(H[3]+d)>>>0;H[4]=(H[4]+e)>>>0;H[5]=(H[5]+f)>>>0;H[6]=(H[6]+g)>>>0;H[7]=(H[7]+h)>>>0;}return H;}function hmacHex(key,msg){const enc=new TextEncoder();let kb=enc.encode(key);if(kb.length>64){const h=sha256(kb),t=new Uint8Array(32),dv=new DataView(t.buffer);h.forEach((v,i)=>dv.setUint32(i*4,v,false));kb=t;}const k=new Uint8Array(64);k.set(kb);const ip=k.map(x=>x^0x36),op=k.map(x=>x^0x5c),mb=enc.encode(msg),inn=new Uint8Array(64+mb.length);inn.set(ip);inn.set(mb,64);const ih=sha256(inn),ib=new Uint8Array(32),id=new DataView(ib.buffer);ih.forEach((v,i)=>id.setUint32(i*4,v,false));const out=new Uint8Array(96);out.set(op);out.set(ib,64);return Array.from(sha256(out)).map(v=>v.toString(16).padStart(8,'0')).join('');}const secret='gatekeeper-hmac-secret-2024';const d=$input.first().json;const tp=JSON.stringify({email:d.email,unit:d.unit,exp:Date.now()+600000});const token=hmacHex(secret,tp);return[{json:{...d,token,tokenPayload:tp}}];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ valid: true, token: $json.token, tokenPayload: $json.tokenPayload, reason: $json.aiReason, flags: $json.aiFlags, confidence: $json.aiConfidence }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ valid: false, reason: $json.aiReason, flags: $json.aiFlags, confidence: $json.aiConfidence }) }}

parameters.jsCode: function sha256(b){const K=[0x428a2f98,0x71374491,0xb5c0fbcf,0xe9b5dba5,0x3956c25b,0x59f111f1,0x923f82a4,0xab1c5ed5,0xd807aa98,0x12835b01,0x243185be,0x550c7dc3,0x72be5d74,0x80deb1fe,0x9bdc06a7,0xc19bf174,0xe49b69c1,0xefbe4786,0x0fc19dc6,0x240ca1cc,0x2de92c6f,0x4a7484aa,0x5cb0a9dc,0x76f988da,0x983e5152,0xa831c66d,0xb00327c8,0xbf597fc7,0xc6e00bf3,0xd5a79147,0x06ca6351,0x14292967,0x27b70a85,0x2e1b2138,0x4d2c6dfc,0x53380d13,0x650a7354,0x766a0abb,0x81c2c92e,0x92722c85,0xa2bfe8a1,0xa81a664b,0xc24b8b70,0xc76c51a3,0xd192e819,0xd6990624,0xf40e3585,0x106aa070,0x19a4c116,0x1e376c08,0x2748774c,0x34b0bcb5,0x391c0cb3,0x4ed8aa4a,0x5b9cca4f,0x682e6ff3,0x748f82ee,0x78a5636f,0x84c87814,0x8cc70208,0x90befffa,0xa4506ceb,0xbef9a3f7,0xc67178f2];const H=new Uint32Array([0x6a09e667,0xbb67ae85,0x3c6ef372,0xa54ff53a,0x510e527f,0x9b05688c,0x1f83d9ab,0x5be0cd19]);const r=(x,n)=>(x>>>n)|(x<<(32-n));const l=b.length,pl=Math.ceil((l+9)/64)*64,p=new Uint8Array(pl);p.set(b);p[l]=0x80;const d0=new DataView(p.buffer);d0.setUint32(pl-4,(l*8)>>>0,false);d0.setUint32(pl-8,Math.floor(l*8/0x100000000),false);for(let i=0;i<pl;i+=64){const W=new Uint32Array(64),dv=new DataView(p.buffer,i,64);for(let j=0;j<16;j++)W[j]=dv.getUint32(j*4,false);for(let j=16;j<64;j++){const s0=r(W[j-15],7)^r(W[j-15],18)^(W[j-15]>>>3),s1=r(W[j-2],17)^r(W[j-2],19)^(W[j-2]>>>10);W[j]=(W[j-16]+s0+W[j-7]+s1)>>>0;}let a=H[0],bb=H[1],c=H[2],d=H[3],e=H[4],f=H[5],g=H[6],h=H[7];for(let j=0;j<64;j++){const t1=(h+(r(e,6)^r(e,11)^r(e,25))+(e&f^~e&g)+K[j]+W[j])>>>0,t2=((r(a,2)^r(a,13)^r(a,22))+(a&bb^a&c^bb&c))>>>0;h=g;g=f;f=e;e=(d+t1)>>>0;d=c;c=bb;bb=a;a=(t1+t2)>>>0;}H[0]=(H[0]+a)>>>0;H[1]=(H[1]+bb)>>>0;H[2]=(H[2]+c)>>>0;H[3]=(H[3]+d)>>>0;H[4]=(H[4]+e)>>>0;H[5]=(H[5]+f)>>>0;H[6]=(H[6]+g)>>>0;H[7]=(H[7]+h)>>>0;}return H;}function hmacHex(key,msg){const enc=new TextEncoder();let kb=enc.encode(key);if(kb.length>64){const h=sha256(kb),t=new Uint8Array(32),dv=new DataView(t.buffer);h.forEach((v,i)=>dv.setUint32(i*4,v,false));kb=t;}const k=new Uint8Array(64);k.set(kb);const ip=k.map(x=>x^0x36),op=k.map(x=>x^0x5c),mb=enc.encode(msg),inn=new Uint8Array(64+mb.length);inn.set(ip);inn.set(mb,64);const ih=sha256(inn),ib=new Uint8Array(32),id=new DataView(ib.buffer);ih.forEach((v,i)=>id.setUint32(i*4,v,false));const out=new Uint8Array(96);out.set(op);out.set(ib,64);return Array.from(sha256(out)).map(v=>v.toString(16).padStart(8,'0')).join('');}const secret='gatekeeper-hmac-secret-2024';const b=$input.first().json.body;const{token,tokenPayload}=b;if(!token||!tokenPayload)return[{json:{...b,tokenValid:false,tokenError:'Missing token'}}];try{const exp=hmacHex(secret,tokenPayload);if(token!==exp)return[{json:{...b,tokenValid:false,tokenError:'Invalid token'}}];const p=JSON.parse(tokenPayload);if(Date.now()>p.exp)return[{json:{...b,tokenValid:false,tokenError:'Token expired'}}];const L='ABCDEFGHJKMNPQRSTUVWXYZ',D='23456789';let code='';for(let i=0;i<3;i++)code+=L[Math.floor(Math.random()*L.length)];for(let i=0;i<3;i++)code+=D[Math.floor(Math.random()*D.length)];return[{json:{...b,tokenValid:true,accessCode:code,registeredAt:new Date().toISOString()}}];}catch(e){return[{json:{...b,tokenValid:false,tokenError:e.message}}];}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $json.tokenError || 'Invalid or expired verification token.' }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const d=$input.first().json;const np=$('Notion — Create Tenant Record').first().json;const dp=$('Drive — Create Parent Folder').first().json;const tenantFolderUrl='https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/'+dp.id;const notionPageUrl='https://www.notion.so/'+np.id.replace(/-/g,'');return[{json:{...d,tenantFolderUrl,notionPageUrl,notionId:np.id}}];

parameters.subject: Welcome to the Tenant Portal — Your Access Code Inside
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Notion — Create Tenant Record').item.json.name }},

Your registration has been verified and approved. Here are your portal details:

ACCESS CODE: {{ $('Notion — Create Tenant Record').item.json.property_access_code }}

DOCUMENTS FOLDER: {{ $json.tenantFolderUrl }}

If you have questions, contact your property manager.
